commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Mattermost progress previews to store structured progress lines, merge them by item/tool identity, render the accumulated draft text, reset per turn, and add helper tests.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +39. Total +92 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main calls draftStream.update with one tool or item progress line and keeps no per-turn line list. I did not run a live Mattermost reproduction.
